subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting: He rejoiceth in My remembrance and maketh mention of Me with wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی من آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم یفرح بذکری و یذکرنی بالحکمة
